articles.title: North Shore police department asking for public’s help after theft of historical plaques
articles.description:
“This incident occurred as the department was already investigating several other thefts of bronze plaques from other locations around the city," police said.

The post North Shore police department asking for public’s help after theft of historical plaques appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: North Shore police seek public assistance after theft of historical plaques.
Multiple thefts of bronze plaques are under investigation across the city.
Residents urged to report any information to help recover stolen items.

articles.title: Bruins sign Merrimack goalie Max Lundgren to entry-level contract
articles.description:
Lundgren helped Merrimack win its first Hockey East title in program history.

The post Bruins sign Merrimack goalie Max Lundgren to entry-level contract appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins sign Merrimack goalie Max Lundgren to an entry-level contract.
Lundgren led Merrimack to its first Hockey East title in program history.
Local fans can expect Lundgren's debut in the upcoming NHL season.

articles.title: Chesney the kangaroo scales tall fence and flees petting zoo for three days on the lam
articles.description:
Chesney the kangaroo jumped an eight-foot fence to escape his petting zoo in Wisconsin, spending three days on the lam

The post Chesney the kangaroo scales tall fence and flees petting zoo for three days on the lam appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Chesney the kangaroo escaped an eight-foot fence at a Wisconsin petting zoo.
The kangaroo was on the run for three days before being captured.
Local petting zoos may enhance security measures to prevent similar escapes.

articles.title: 2 people from Mass. killed when helicopter crashes in Hawaii
articles.description:
Margaret Rimmler, 65, and Patrick Haskell, 59, both of Massachusetts, died in the crash, Kauai officials said.

The post 2 people from Mass. killed when helicopter crashes in Hawaii appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Margaret Rimmler, 65, and Patrick Haskell, 59, died in a helicopter crash in Hawaii.
The crash occurred in Kauai, raising concerns about safety for Massachusetts travelers.
Local community mourns the loss of two residents, highlighting the risks of adventure tourism.

articles.title: Red Sox drop season-opening series to Reds with 3-2 loss
articles.description:
Wilyer Abreu went 6 for 13 for Boston in the three-game series with two home runs, two doubles, and four RBIs.

The post Red Sox drop season-opening series to Reds with 3-2 loss appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox lost the season-opening series to the Reds, 3-2.
Wilyer Abreu excelled, hitting 6 for 13 with two home runs.
Boston fans face disappointment as team starts season with a series loss.
